Global Variable# kIMKSingleColumnScrollingCandidatePanel

macOS 10.5+

```
var kIMKSingleColumnScrollingCandidatePanel: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/inputmethodkit/kimksinglecolumnscrollingcandidatepanel#Discussion)

A window that displays one column and can scroll if necessary.
